# Reconnaissance Summary — OWASP Juice Shop

**Generated:** 2026-06-03T18:35:00Z  
**Model:** haiku  
**Repo:** /home/mrohr/juice-shop  
**Categories scanned:** 26

---

## 1. Business Context

OWASP Juice Shop v19.2.1 is a deliberately vulnerable e-commerce web application for security awareness training, CTF competitions, and penetration testing practice. It covers OWASP Top 10, OWASP API Top 10, and additional vulnerability categories across 100+ intentional challenges. Maintained by Björn Kimminich under MIT license as an OWASP Flagship Project.

---

## 2. Technology Stack

| Component | Technology | Version |
|---|---|---|
| Runtime | Node.js | 24 |
| Backend | Express | ^4.22.1 |
| Frontend | Angular | 20 |
| Database (primary) | SQLite via Sequelize | ^6.37.3 |
| Database (reviews/orders) | MarsDB (MongoDB-like) | latest |
| Auth | express-jwt | **0.1.3 (pinned vulnerable)** |
| Auth signing | jsonwebtoken, jws | latest |
| Template engine | Handlebars (hbs) + Pug | ^3.0.3 |
| File parsing | libxmljs2 | ~0.37.0 |
| ZIP handling | unzipper | **0.9.15 (pinned vulnerable)** |
| HTML sanitization | sanitize-html | **1.4.2 (pinned vulnerable)** |
| Safe eval | notevil | ^1.3.3 |
| WebSocket | socket.io | ^3.1.2 |
| Config | node-config | latest |
| Containerization | Docker (distroless/nodejs24) | - |
| CI/CD | GitHub Actions | - |

---

## 3. Manifest / Package List

Key packages with security relevance:
- `express-jwt@0.1.3` — intentionally pinned vulnerable (Dependabot ignore rule)
- `sanitize-html@1.4.2` — intentionally pinned vulnerable (Dependabot ignore rule)
- `unzipper@0.9.15` — intentionally pinned vulnerable (Dependabot ignore rule)
- `libxmljs2@~0.37.0` — XML parsing with external entity support
- `notevil@1.3.3` — sandboxed eval (bypassed by design)
- `pug@^3.0.3` — template engine (SSTI target)
- `marsdb` — MongoDB-compatible in-memory DB (NoSQL injection target)
- `sequelize@^6.37.3` — SQLite ORM (SQLi via raw queries)
- `helmet@^4.6.0` — partial security headers (CSP NOT configured)
- `express-rate-limit@^7.5.1` — rate limiting (selective application only)

---

## 4. Directory / File Structure

```
juice-shop/
├── app.ts           # Entry point
├── server.ts        # Express setup, all route registrations (~750 lines)
├── routes/          # 50+ route handler files (TypeScript)
├── models/          # Sequelize ORM models (User, Product, Basket, etc.)
├── lib/
│   ├── insecurity.ts  # CRITICAL: JWT private key hardcoded, MD5 hashing
│   └── startup/     # Server initialization
├── data/
│   ├── mongodb.ts   # MarsDB collections (reviews, orders)
│   ├── datacreator.ts # Seeds DB with hardcoded users
│   └── static/
│       └── users.yml  # Hardcoded credentials (admin:admin123, etc.)
├── frontend/        # Angular SPA
│   └── src/app/     # Components, services, guards
├── ftp/             # Publicly accessible sensitive files
│   ├── acquisitions.md   # Confidential M&A document
│   ├── incident-support.kdbx # KeePass database
│   ├── coupons_2013.md.bak
│   └── package-lock.json.bak
├── encryptionkeys/  # Publicly browsable
│   ├── jwt.pub      # RSA public key
│   └── premium.key  # Premium content key
├── logs/            # Access logs (directory listing at /support/logs)
├── Dockerfile       # Multi-stage build (distroless final)
├── docker-compose.test.yml
└── .github/workflows/ # CI/CD with CodeQL, ZAP scan
```

---

## 5. Authentication & Authorization

| Feature | Implementation | Status |
|---|---|---|
| Authentication | JWT (RS256) via express-jwt | **Private key hardcoded in lib/insecurity.ts:26** |
| Password hashing | MD5 only | **Broken — lib/insecurity.ts:43** |
| Token storage | localStorage | XSS-accessible |
| Admin guard | Client-side only (Angular) | Server enforcement missing for some routes |
| CSRF protection | None | **Missing** |
| 2FA | TOTP supported | Available but optional |
| OAuth | Google OAuth | Client ID hardcoded in config |
| Session | Token-based (no server-side sessions) | - |
| Rate limiting | Password reset + 2FA endpoints only | Login endpoint **unprotected** |

---

## 6. Exposed Routes (Category 11 - from recon_patterns.py)

| Route | Auth | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| GET /api-docs | None | Swagger UI |
| GET /metrics | None | Prometheus metrics exposed |
| GET /ftp/* | None | Directory listing + file download |
| GET /encryptionkeys/* | None | JWT pub key + premium.key |
| GET /support/logs/* | None | Access logs |
| GET /.well-known/* | None | CSAF, security.txt |
| POST /file-upload | None | ZIP/XML/YAML upload |
| POST /rest/user/login | None | SQL injection, no rate limit |
| GET /rest/products/search | None | SQL injection |
| GET /rest/products/:id/reviews | None | NoSQL injection ($where) |
| GET /rest/track-order/:id | None | SQL injection |
| GET /profile | JWT | SSTI + eval() in username |
| POST /b2b/v2/orders | JWT | RCE via notevil |
| GET /api/Users | JWT | User enumeration |
| GET /administration | JWT+AdminGuard (client) | Admin panel |

---

## 7. Security Findings

### 7.1 Secrets & Credentials

| Finding | Location | Severity |
|---|---|---|
| RSA private key for JWT hardcoded | lib/insecurity.ts:26-28 | **Critical** |
| HMAC secret hardcoded | lib/insecurity.ts:44 (`pa4qacea4VK9t9nGv7yZtwmj`) | High |
| Admin credentials: admin@juice-sh.op:admin123 | data/static/users.yml:3-4 | **Critical** |
| Multiple user passwords in users.yml | data/static/users.yml | High |
| Google OAuth Client ID | config/default.yml:59 | Medium |
| JWT public key exposed at /encryptionkeys/jwt.pub | server.ts:277 | High |

**Secret masking note:** Full RSA private key and HMAC secret intentionally withheld from this report per secret-handling policy.

### 7.2 SQL Injection

| Finding | Location | Severity |
|---|---|---|
| SQLi in login (email + password fields) | routes/login.ts:37 | **Critical** |
| SQLi in product search | routes/search.ts:23 | **Critical** |
| SQLi in order tracking | routes/trackOrder.ts | High |
| SQLi in basket retrieval | routes/basket.ts | High |

### 7.3 NoSQL Injection

| Finding | Location | Severity |
|---|---|---|
| NoSQL injection via $where clause in product reviews | routes/showProductReviews.ts:35 | High |
| NoSQL injection in review update (no author check) | routes/updateProductReviews.ts:16 | High |

### 7.4 Injection / Code Execution

| Finding | Location | Severity |
|---|---|---|
| SSTI + eval() in username (profile page) | routes/userProfile.ts:62 | **Critical** |
| RCE via vm.runInContext on B2B order data | routes/b2bOrder.ts:22 | **Critical** |
| XXE via libxmljs2 with noent:true | routes/fileUpload.ts:45 | **Critical** |
| Directory traversal in ZIP upload | routes/fileUpload.ts:36-52 | High |

### 7.5 XSS

| Finding | Location | Severity |
|---|---|---|
| Stored XSS via bypassSecurityTrustHtml (feedback comments) | frontend/src/app/administration/administration.component.ts:78 | High |
| Stored XSS via bypassSecurityTrustHtml (user emails in admin) | frontend/src/app/administration/administration.component.ts:60 | High |
| DOM XSS in search results | frontend/src/app/search-result/search-result.component.ts | High |

### 7.6 Authentication Issues

| Finding | Location | Severity |
|---|---|---|
| JWT alg:none bypass possible (express-jwt@0.1.3) | lib/insecurity.ts + routes/verify.ts:83 | **Critical** |
| JWT HS256 forging possible (HMAC secret hardcoded) | routes/verify.ts:86 | **Critical** |
| MD5 password hashing | lib/insecurity.ts:43 | **Critical** |
| No rate limiting on login | server.ts | High |
| Token stored in localStorage (XSS-accessible) | frontend/src/app/login/login.component.ts:101 | High |

### 7.7 Authorization Issues

| Finding | Location | Severity |
|---|---|---|
| Admin panel guard client-side only | frontend/src/app/app.guard.ts | High |
| IDOR in basket access (user can access other users' baskets) | routes/basket.ts | High |
| PUT /api/Products/:id not protected (intentional) | server.ts:369 (commented out) | High |
| No CSRF protection anywhere | server.ts | High |

### 7.8 Sensitive Data Exposure

| Finding | Location | Severity |
|---|---|---|
| Confidential M&A document at /ftp/acquisitions.md | ftp/acquisitions.md | High |
| KeePass database at /ftp/incident-support.kdbx | ftp/incident-support.kdbx | High |
| Access logs exposed at /support/logs | server.ts:280-282 | Medium |
| Prometheus metrics exposed at /metrics | server.ts:718 | Medium |

### 7.9 Configuration / Headers

| Finding | Location | Severity |
|---|---|---|
| Wildcard CORS (all origins allowed) | server.ts:181-182 | High |
| No Content-Security-Policy | server.ts | High |
| helmet.xssFilter() commented out | server.ts | High |
| CORS origin not validated | server.ts | High |

### 7.10 Supply Chain

| Finding | Location | Severity |
|---|---|---|
| Vulnerable express-jwt@0.1.3 pinned | package.json + .dependabot/config.yml | **Critical** |
| Vulnerable sanitize-html@1.4.2 pinned | package.json + .dependabot/config.yml | **Critical** |
| Vulnerable unzipper@0.9.15 pinned | package.json + .dependabot/config.yml | High |
| 3 unpinned GitHub Actions (coveralls, codeql x3) | .github/workflows/ | Medium |
| Docker image without digest pinning | Dockerfile:1 | Medium |
| latest tag in docker-compose.test.yml | docker-compose.test.yml:7 | Medium |

### 7.25 Cross-Repository Dependencies

No related repositories configured.

## 9. Preliminary Component List

Based on recon findings, the following security-critical components are identified:

1. **express-backend** — Express.js API server (`server.ts`, `routes/`)
   - Paths: `server.ts`, `routes/**`, `lib/**`, `models/**`, `data/**`
   - Complexity: Complex (50+ routes, multiple injection points)
   
2. **angular-spa** — Angular Single-Page Application (`frontend/src/`)
   - Paths: `frontend/src/**`
   - Complexity: Moderate
   
3. **data-layer** — SQLite + MarsDB data persistence (`models/`, `data/mongodb.ts`)
   - Paths: `models/**`, `data/**`
   - Complexity: Moderate
   
4. **file-upload-service** — File upload handlers (ZIP, XML, YAML) (`routes/fileUpload.ts`)
   - Paths: `routes/fileUpload.ts`, `routes/profileImage*.ts`
   - Complexity: Moderate
   
5. **b2b-api** — B2B order API with eval (`routes/b2bOrder.ts`, `/b2b/v2/*`)
   - Paths: `routes/b2bOrder.ts`, `routes/web3Wallet.ts`, `routes/nftMint.ts`
   - Complexity: Moderate

---

## 11. Key Architecture Observations for STRIDE

1. **Trust model is inverted by design** — attackers are the primary users
2. **Single-process monolith** — all components run in one Node.js process
3. **No reverse proxy** — Express serves everything directly on port 3000
4. **Dual database** — SQLite (relational) + MarsDB (document) with different injection patterns
5. **Client-side security enforcement** — Angular guards control admin access, trivially bypassed
6. **Hardcoded RSA private key** enables complete JWT forgery for any user/role
7. **intentional vulnerabilities span all OWASP Top 10 categories**
